Container.Name: Fresharr
Container.Overview: Fresharr discovers new and highly rated movies, TV shows and anime from Rotten Tomatoes, IMDb, Metacritic, Letterboxd, TMDB, Trakt, AniList and MyAnimeList, and automatically adds them to Radarr and Sonarr (anime series get Sonarr's anime type). All configuration happens in the web interface: Radarr/Sonarr connections and API keys, score thresholds, original-language filters, per-site toggles and the run schedule. Runs happen at a random time around your chosen interval, never less than 18 hours apart. Start with DRY_RUN=true to preview what it would add before letting it loose.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Fresharr web interface, where all settings live.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Stores Fresharr's settings (connections, thresholds, schedule, enabled sites) and its state file (which titles were already added).

Config.Name: Dry Run
Config.Description: true = only log what would be added, don't touch Radarr/Sonarr. Set to false once you're happy with the results.
